login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Please enter your details to access your exam
login.forgot_desc: Enter your email to request a password reset. An administrator will review and send a temporary password via email.
login.forgot_success: Request submitted. Please wait for administrator to process.
login.forgot_failed: Unable to submit request. Please try again.
login.hero_slide_1: Experience a seamless examination environment designed to help you focus on what matters most — your performance.
login.hero_slide_2: Add more slides with different messages here.
login.login_failed: Login failed, please try again later
login.session_revoked_warning: Your account was logged in on another device. The session on that device has been terminated.
login.session_kicked: Your session ended because this account signed in on another browser or device. Please sign in again.
login.socket_check_desc: Checking realtime (Socket.IO) connection to the API...
login.socket_fail_text: Realtime not connected: {{message}}. (Login still succeeds; check /socket.io proxy on the API.)

common.subject: Subject
common.name: Full name
common.change_password_soon: Password change will be available soon.
common.fill_required: Please fill in all required fields.
common.password_mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.

dashboard.welcome_note: Dashboard data is loaded live from the system.
dashboard.welcome_note_stats: From the server: {{taken}} submitted exam(s); {{upcoming}} exam(s) in your enrolled classes. All widgets below come from GET /v1/dashboard.
dashboard.load_error: Could not load dashboard. Please try again.
dashboard.activity_load_error: Could not load activity list. Please try again.
dashboard.unsupported_role: This role is not supported on the dashboard.
dashboard.upcoming_empty: No exams in your enrolled classes yet.
dashboard.chart_empty: Not enough exam history to draw the chart.
dashboard.staff_hint: Aggregated from the database. Manage accounts on the User management page.
dashboard.students_empty: No students match the current filters.

performance.title: Recent performance
performance.subtitle: Compare your score with class average

prediction.title: AI score prediction
prediction.subtitle: Based on your previous subject scores
prediction.subtitle_cached: Results are computed in a batch by an administrator; you only view the saved report (no AI call from your browser).
prediction.subtitle_student: Pick a subject to predict; we check prerequisites in its group, then analyze a related exam (max 5 concurrent, up to 2 minutes).
prediction.cache_empty: No prediction yet. Click "Generate AI prediction" to analyze your latest exam.
prediction.generate_timeout: No response within 2 minutes (busy or slow AI). Please try again later.
prediction.wrong_summary_title: Wrong answers from your latest exam
prediction.admin_intro: Cost-saving: one batch run for all students with exam history; students only read cached results.
prediction.admin_note: This may take several minutes for many students (one MiniMax call per student). MINIMAX_API_KEY must be set on the server.
prediction.admin_summary_line: Total students: {{total}} — Computed: {{computed}} — Skipped (no data): {{skipped}} — Failed: {{failed}}
prediction.subject: Subject
prediction.no_data: Not enough historical data for an accurate prediction yet.

profile.title: Account settings
profile.resets_empty: You have no password reset requests.
profile.name: Full name
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal profile and account security.
profile.contact_admin_hint: If your personal information is not accurate, please contact your administrator.
profile.password_hint: Use at least 8 characters including uppercase, lowercase, and numbers.
profile.password_min_length: New password must be at least 8 characters.
profile.change_password_desc: Enter your current and new password. No email approval is required.
profile.change_password_missing: Please fill in all password fields.
profile.change_password_error: Could not change password. Check your current password.
profile.student_forgot_desc: If you do not remember your current password, submit a request for a temporary password by email.
profile.admin_password_note: Admins only change password here—no email reset requests.
profile.admin_change_desc: Enter current and new password. Admin accounts do not use the email request workflow.
profile.admin_forgot_help: If you forgot your password: ask another admin to open User management → key icon on your admin row → temporary password by email. If you are the only admin, run reset-admin-password on the server.
profile.reset_request_desc: Your request will be sent to an administrator. After approval, a temporary password will be emailed to you.
profile.reset_request_hint: Only one pending request is allowed at a time.
profile.reset_request_confirm: Send a password reset request to the administrator?
profile.reset_request_error: Could not submit the request. Please try again later.

exam_list.title: Exam list
exam_list.force_submit_confirm: Are you sure you want to force-submit all active sessions for this exam?
exam_list.take_retake_hint: Your teacher allowed a retake for this exam
exam_list.start_runtime_hint: Opens the exam window for the class. Students who already submitted need an individual retake grant in Session management.
exam_list.start_scheduled_hint: This exam will open automatically at the scheduled start time.
exam_list.start_ended_hint: This exam is past the scheduled end time.

exam_retake.revoke_confirm: Revoke retake permission? The student will not be able to retake.

exam_result.no_result: No result for this exam yet

exam_result.pending_manual: This submission contains essay questions and is pending manual grading.

proctoring.active_alert: {{count}} students are taking the exam. Real-time monitoring is active.
proctoring.broadcast_placeholder: E.g. Time is almost up, please submit…

exam_take.fullscreen_desc: You must enable fullscreen mode before taking the exam.
exam_take.fullscreen_error: Could not enable fullscreen. Please try again or use another browser.
exam_take.violation_warning_message: You have {{current}}/{{max}} integrity warnings. Stay on the exam tab and do not leave the screen.
exam_take.violation_strike_banner_body: {{remaining}} warning(s) left before the exam is locked and auto-submitted.
exam_take.violation_final_reason: Exceeded {{max}} integrity warnings. The exam will be locked and auto-submitted.
exam_take.violation_reason_tab: You left the exam tab. Please return to the exam screen.
exam_take.violation_reason_blur: Exam window lost focus. Keep the exam tab on top.
exam_take.violation_reason_fullscreen: Left fullscreen for too long. Please enable fullscreen again.
exam_take.submit_remaining: Time is still left ({{left}}). Submit now?
exam_take.placeholder_prompt: Question {{number}} — placeholder content (will be replaced by API).
